creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like this is caused by changes to the English send-pr page that
haven't been merged into the Japanese page.  At a minimum,
www/en/send-pr.sgml 1.50 needs merging, although merging all the changes
since 1.40 (especially 1.42, 1.50, 1.52, 1.54, 1.57, 1.59, 1.60) would
be best.
